title: perfoliata ciliata
intro: Perfoliata ciliata, also known as the ciliate perfoliate, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, thanks to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Perfoliata ciliata include relief from coughs, colds, and sore throats, as well as the reduction of inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of Perfoliata ciliata typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the leaves, roots, or flowers of the plant, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or applied topically.
